narrative:
Erie Twp township has 770 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
